title: Vegan Polish Tacos
description: A creative twist on traditional tacos, using polish flair and vegan ingredients.

ingredients.name: Mildly Spiced Polish Sausage (made from tofu)
Tacos Fish-Free Caviar (made from vegan ingredients)

instructions: 1. Preheat a grill to medium-high heat.
2. Grill the polish sausage for 5-7 minutes, turning occasionally.
3. Meanwhile, toast the polish rye bread slices.
4. Assemble the tacos by placing a slice of toasted bread on a plate, topping with a slice of grilled sausage, diced lettuce, chopped caviar, and a dollop of vegan sour cream.
5. Sprinkle chopped cilantro and polish mustard on top.
